policy_after.description: Read-only public sellability policy for filtering dynamic offer previews. This config does not publish offers, create appointments, or change Enrollware behavior.
policy_after.notes: Initial conservative public-sellability policy. HSI is enabled only through confirmed appointment-container filtering. ARC and USCG remain hidden until Brian explicitly approves public dynamic offers for those families.

proof.rendered_dynamic_offer_verdict_reason: All public sellable dynamic appointment-seed offers are visible in rendered customer-facing HTML with correct links.

interpretation: Enabling the HSI family alone did not increase public sellable/rendered HSI inventory. The remaining blockers are course ID enablement/container/course mapping and other existing gates, while confirmed appointment-container filtering stayed enabled.
